label: tools/list (before)
response: devreload_build_project, devreload_get_assembly_info, devreload_get_available_projects, devreload_list_plugins, devreload_list_tools, devreload_list_worktrees, devreload_load_plugin, devreload_read_shared_assemblies, devreload_register_new_plugin, devreload_reload, devreload_unload_all, devreload_unload_plugin, devreload_unregister, devreload_update_active_worktree, devreload_update_build_configuration, devreload_write_shared_assemblies

label: devreload_list_tools
response: [{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_build_project","description":"Invoke \u0060dotnet build\u0060 for a csproj and return the structured result with full log."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_get_assembly_info","description":"Inspect the loaded assembly behind a plugin: name, version, file location, last-write timestamp."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_get_available_projects","description":"Enumerate projects in running Visual Studio instances via COM. Returns project name \u002B Debug-config DLL path \u002B .csproj."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_list_plugins","description":"List every registered plugin with its current state. The single source of truth for registration \u002B load status; filter the returned list rather than asking with three separate query tools."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_list_tools","description":"List every MCP tool currently registered with the Acad.Rpc host, grouped by source assembly."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_list_worktrees","description":"List git worktrees rooted at the given repo path, with branch names. Each entry is { path, branch, isMain }."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_load_plugin","description":"Load a registered plugin if not already loaded. If a build is triggered (missing DLL) the full build log is returned under \u0027build\u0027."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_read_shared_assemblies","description":"Read SharedAssemblies.Config.json from a build directory. Returns shared/mixed-mode/streamed lists."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_register_new_plugin","description":"Register a new plugin with DevReload and persist it to plugins.json. After this call the plugin is available for load via this surface\u0027s load_plugin tool or the generated AutoCAD {prefix}LOAD command."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_reload","description":"Build the plugin from source and load (or reload) it into a fresh isolated ALC. Equivalent to clicking \u0027Reload\u0027 in the palette. If the build fails, the response carries the full build log under \u0027build\u0027."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_unload_all","description":"Unload every loaded plugin. Used during shutdown or to recover from a wedged state."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_unload_plugin","description":"Unload a loaded plugin (tear down its isolated ALC). No-op if not loaded."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_unregister","description":"Remove a plugin from the registry AND from plugins.json. Unloads it first if loaded. Durable across AutoCAD restarts."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_update_active_worktree","description":"Point this plugin at a git worktree path (or null to clear). Persists to plugins.json via the same path the palette UI uses."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_update_build_configuration","description":"Switch the build configuration (Debug / Release) used for the next build of this plugin. Persists to plugins.json via the same path the palette UI uses."},{"sourceAssembly":"DevReload","toolName":"devreload_write_shared_assemblies","description":"Write SharedAssemblies.Config.json into a build directory. Overwrites any existing file."}]
